scripts.promote:preprod: git checkout preprod && git pull origin preprod && git merge develop --no-ff -m 'promote: develop → preprod' && git push origin preprod && git checkout develop && echo '✓ develop → preprod done — check https://preprod--lazxr.netlify.app'
scripts.promote:main: git checkout main && git pull origin main && git merge preprod --no-ff -m 'release: preprod → main' && git push origin main && git checkout develop && echo '✓ preprod → main done — check https://lazxr.com'
